stations.name: Closest stations are Coorparoo and Buranda

buses.note: Bus routes serve Greenslopes via Logan Road and the South-East Busway interchange.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 10 to 14 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Coorparoo Secondary College or Holland Park State High catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Greenslopes Mall handles daily-life retail. The Stones Corner village strip is on the doorstep with cafes, casual dining, and bars. The Greenslopes Private Hospital sits within the suburb.

pockets.name: Hospital and Mall precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the hospital and the mall. Mix of character and post-war stock.

pockets.name: Family streets near Norman Creek
pockets.character: Quieter residential streets with established family-home stock.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving from Tarragindi or Coorparoo for the inner-CBD proximity.
Greenslopes Private Hospital drives a professional resident base.
Accessible inner-south entry point relative to Coorparoo and Camp Hill.
